name: electron-automation-cli
description: Token-efficient CLI for Electron automation via Playwright

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --target=bun --outdir dist --external playwright --external electron
scripts.build:binary: bun build src/cli.ts --target=bun --compile --outfile dist/e-cli --external playwright --external electron
scripts.install:local: bun run build:binary && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && cp dist/e-cli "$HOME/.local/bin/e-cli" && chmod +x "$HOME/.local/bin/e-cli"
